name: First Bank and Trust Company of Illinois
description_short: Community-focused bank offering personal and business checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, and commercial lending with a national presence while maintaining personalized service.
description_long: First Bank and Trust Company of Illinois has operated for over 60 years as a community bank committed to personalized customer relationships. Founded with a mission to provide banking services while fostering meaningful connections with customers, the bank has evolved from its local roots into a prominent commercial lending specialist with national reach. The company positions itself as treating every customer like family, regardless of account size or loan complexity. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, CDs, and IRAs with competitive rates. On the digital side, customers access online banking, mobile banking through a user-friendly app, and Zelle money transfer capabilities. Additional services include wire transfers (fee-free), surcharge-free ATM access through the NYCE network with thousands of nationwide locations, free chip-enabled Mastercard debit cards, and complimentary notary services through personal bankers. First Bank distinguishes itself through its stated emphasis on personalized service and community commitment despite scaling to commercial lending operations. The bank explicitly positions itself as serving both individual checking customers and multi-million dollar commercial borrowers with equal dedication. Their membership in the NYCE ATM network provides practical value through surcharge-free nationwide access, and the elimination of wire transfer fees removes a common banking cost. The website provides limited transparency on specific APY rates (directing to a "VIEW RATES" page not included in provided content), account fees, minimum balances, or credit requirements. The company's evolution from community bank to commercial lending specialist suggests a potential shift in priorities, though stated values emphasize maintaining personal attention. No information addresses loan terms, approval timelines, or specific lending criteria for either personal or commercial products.
pros: Fee-free wire transfers available to all eligible customers
Surcharge-free ATM access through NYCE network with thousands of nationwide locations
Free chip-enabled Mastercard debit cards for eligible customers
Complimentary notary services provided by personal bankers
Mobile banking app described as user-friendly for on-the-go account management
Zelle integration for fast, safe money transfers between most U.S. bank accounts
Over 60 years of operating history and established community presence
cons: Specific APY rates and account fees not disclosed on homepage (requires separate page access)
Limited information on minimum balance requirements or eligibility criteria
No details provided about personal loan products, rates, or terms
Commercial lending focus may indicate reduced priority on retail customers
Scheduled system maintenance windows may periodically disrupt online access
best_for: Illinois-based customers seeking traditional community banking with nationwide ATM access
Small to medium-sized commercial businesses requiring personalized lending relationships
Customers prioritizing fee-free services like wire transfers and debit cards
Users wanting integrated digital banking with mobile app and Zelle money transfer capabilities
diagnosis: First Bank and Trust Company of Illinois is best for customers in Illinois or with national reach needs seeking a traditional bank with competitive rates, fee-free services, and a stated commitment to personalized banking. The main caveat is limited transparency about specific rates, fees, and loan terms on their public website, requiring direct contact to evaluate competitiveness against other banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community-focused bank offering personal and business checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, and commercial lending with personalized service.
fdic_official_name: First Bank and Trust Company of Illinois
